title: Where in the World Was the SBDC Executive Director? In May, Juneau!
summary: If you were walking around Juneau last month, you may have run into our Executive Director, Jon Bittner, wandering around town with a camera crew. They filmed a segment about BuyAlaska and the importance of buying local that will be played on cruise ships that visit Southeast Alaska. A few of the lo...

title: Tribe Celebrates Opening of the Net, New Harvest Pavilion
summary: The Tribal Council cuts the ribbon Thursday for the new Kahtnuht’ana Community Hall and Harvest Pavilion at the Tribe’s educational fishery site at Waterfront. The event took place during the annual Opening of the Net gathering. Pictured are Council Members Bernadine Atchison and Mary Ann Mills; Treasurer Gabe Juliussen Jr., Chair Ronette Stanton, Secretary Brenda Smith, Council Member Liisia Blizzard and Vice Chair Wayne D. Wilson Jr. Tribal Members were ready to set the net during the Opening of the Net celebr...
